scenarios.description: parseBodyFragment(String html, String baseUri) with empty baseUri and fragment containing a relative link preserves the relative href
scenarios.expectedResult: body HTML contains <a href="page.html"> without resolving to absolute URL
pseudocode: TEST TC06 parseBodyFragment preserves relative link without baseUri

scenarios.description: parseBodyFragment(String html, String baseUri) with non-empty baseUri resolves relative href to absolute URL
pseudocode: TEST TC07 parseBodyFragment resolves relative link with baseUri

scenarios.description: parseBodyFragment(String html, String baseUri) with <base href> in fragment overrides the provided baseUri for link resolution
scenarios.expectedResult: body HTML uses <base> href for resolving relative link instead of parameter baseUri
pseudocode: TEST TC08 parseBodyFragment uses embedded <base> tag over provided baseUri
